# Clary — Healthcare ERP & Clinic Management System

> Clary is a Healthcare ERP (clinic management system) for clinics, hospitals, laboratories, pharmacies and dental practices. It unifies the full clinic workflow — patient intake, scheduling, billing and reporting — in one multi-tenant platform. Category: Healthcare ERP / Clinic Management Software. Also known as: Clary Healthcare ERP.

## What Clary is
- **Category:** Healthcare ERP / Clinic Management System (hospital, clinic, lab, pharmacy management software).
- **Audience:** clinics, hospitals, diagnostic & laboratory centers, pharmacies, dental practices.
- **Region:** Uzbekistan and CIS; 7 languages (uz-Latn, uz-Cyrl, ru, kk, ky, tg, en).

## Modules (one platform)
- Reception & patient registry, Queue/appointments
- Cashier / billing (POS, debt tracking, receipts)
- Doctor console & EMR/EHR
- Laboratory (LIS), Diagnostics/imaging
- Pharmacy (inventory, sales)
- Inpatient (stationary) management
- Dental module
- Payroll & staff management
- Analytics / BI dashboards, Marketing 2.0
- Desktop app (silent thermal printing), Patient app, Telegram reports

## Product
- [Home](https://clary.uz/): Healthcare ERP overview, features, pricing
- [Healthcare ERP](https://clary.uz/solutions/healthcare-erp): What a Healthcare ERP is and why clinics use Clary
- [Features](https://clary.uz/features): Full module matrix
- [Pricing](https://clary.uz/pricing): Demo / 25PRO / 50PRO / 120PRO

## Integrations
- Payments: Click, Payme, Uzum, Kaspi, Humo, Uzcard, Stripe, Apelsin
- SMS: Eskiz, Playmobile, Twilio
- Email: Resend, Postmark, SMTP

## Compliance
- Uzbekistan Law 547 (Persdata), GDPR-style data subject rights
- PII encryption (pgsodium), RLS isolation, settings audit hash chain

## Trust
- Status: https://status.clary.uz
- Security disclosure: clarysupport@gmail.com
